subject: Adding a species in M from relion/ Is there a log file ?
body:
Hi Warp Group 

I am trying to import a run_data.star from a relion 3.0 single particle 
refinement  directly into M . I follow the steps to add a new spices and 
they execute  without a hitch . The import of the star file is also 
seemingly successful . However I get a message as seen in the screenshot 
(0/Number of particles matched to available data sources) 

I was wondering if there is a log file for M where any particular import 
errors are dumped or a debug mode so I can figure if M is parsing my file 
correctly 

Thanks 
Josh
